header.title: Security settings
header.description: Manage your connected devices, sessions, and multi-factor authentication

deviceTips.title: Security recommendations
deviceTips.item2: Immediately revoke access from any device you do not recognize
deviceTips.item3: If you see suspicious activity, change your password and review your account
deviceTips.item4: Enable MFA recovery codes for emergency access

mfaTips.title: MFA best practices
mfaTips.item1: Store recovery codes in a secure password manager
mfaTips.item2: Never share your recovery codes with anyone
mfaTips.item3: Generate new codes periodically, for example every 3 months
mfaTips.item4: Keep recovery codes separate from your authenticator backup

footer.contact: For security matters, contact your system administrator

header.title: Security settings
header.description: Manage your connected devices and active sessions

tips.title: Security recommendations
tips.item2: Immediately revoke access from any device you do not recognize
tips.item3: Sign out from devices when you are not using them
tips.item4: Report any suspicious activity to your administrator

errors.revokeFailed: Could not revoke the device session

agent.confirmRevoke: Are you sure you want to revoke access for "{deviceName}"? You will need to sign in again on that device.
